name: Potato Slices with Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice the potatoes.
2. In a buttered crockpot, alternate layers of potato slices with cheese. Lightly season each layer of potato slices with salt, pepper, and nutmeg as you go.
3. Finish by layering with additional cheese, dotting with butter, and gently pouring stock over all.
4. Cover the crockpot and bake on High for 3 hours.
5. Remove the cover and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
6. Serve directly from the crockpot. The potato slices will have a crisp skin around the edges.
These thin potato slices can be used as a base for complete dinners by adding vegetables and meat or poultry.
